overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from a covered walkway past modern glass buildings to a busy commercial street with digital billboards and outdoor cafes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beside glass corporate building

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past a modern glass building with green interior lighting

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass facade and green interior lighting
tall palm tree in planter on sidewalk
vertical neon sign with Kiroshi text visible in the distance
overhead covering protecting the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beside a modern glass building illuminated with green lights. The area is relatively quiet with sparse pedestrians and wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open street intersection
black vehicle drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at the intersection and continues along the sidewalk beside an industrial building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street from left to right

entered.detail: building with distinctive yellow and black striped facade
elevated roadway or walkway crossing above the street
yellow warning signs with black text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open intersection beneath an overpass. The camera crosses the street beside a yellow and black industrial building while vehicles pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with prominent warning signage

events.description: red sports car with neon underglow drives past on the street
approaching commercial district with large digital billboards becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying colorful advertisements
tables and umbrellas for outdoor dining along the building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street dominated by a building covered in yellow warning signs. The scene transitions toward a brighter area with large digital billboards and outdoor cafe seating visible ahead.

events.description: entering brightly lit area with massive digital billboards and neon storefronts
camera follows character through denser crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy commercial plaza passing outdoor cafes and digital advertisements, character visible from behind wearing a vest

notable_agents.action: person in bright green pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large screen displaying NO SCREAM advertisement with a face
building facade with bright pink and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Entering a vibrant commercial plaza filled with massive digital billboards, neon-lit storefronts, and outdoor dining areas. The crowd density increases as the character walks past pedestrians and bright advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, neon-lit corridor into a bustling, high-energy commercial plaza. It begins along a covered sidewalk beside a modern glass building illuminated with green lights, where wet pavement reflects the sparse glow of the surroundings. As the camera exits the walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection beneath an overpass, crossing past a yellow and black industrial building while vehicles stream by. The path then shifts toward a commercial street dominated by yellow warning signs, with the lighting gradually brightening as large digital billboards appear in the distance. Finally, the environment expands into a vibrant plaza filled with massive advertisements, neon storefronts, and crowded outdoor dining areas.
